channel.title: Tech on Dave Voyles
channel.description: Recent content in Tech on Dave Voyles

item.title: How does Microsoft compare in the Fortune 500?
item.description: Before I joined Microsoft, I was an engineer at Comcast, on their COAM (Consumer Owned and Maintained Devices) team, where I worked on their Xbox 360, Xbox One, and SmartGlass apps. Now that I’m at Microsoft, another Fortune 50 company, I’ve kept a close eye on all of the large tech companies, to see how they weigh against one another. Here are some results from the recent Fortune magazine analysis:
